indicators.name: rowing machine
indicators.rationale: The rowing machine is not suitable for sleep as it is an exercise equipment and does not provide a comfortable resting surface.

indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: The hard floor is not comfortable for sleeping and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no bed or other resting surface
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other resting surface available for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains to control light and provide privacy.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for sleep (Primary) due to the absence of a bed or other resting surface, the presence of a rowing machine, and the lack of windows or curtains to control light and provide privacy. The hard floor also contributes to the negative assessment.
